cd /app && nohup python3 server.py > /app/server.log 2>&1 &
sleep 3; echo "log:"; cat /app/server.log; echo "---port:"; python3 - <<'EOF'
import grpc, kv_store_pb2, kv_store_pb2_grpc
ch = grpc.insecure_channel("localhost:5328")
stub = kv_store_pb2_grpc.KVStoreStub(ch)
print(stub.SetVal(kv_store_pb2.SetValRequest(key="a", value=42)).val)
print(stub.GetVal(kv_store_pb2.GetValRequest(key="a")).val)
print(stub.GetVal(kv_store_pb2.GetValRequest(key="missing")).val)
EOF
